name: context7
description: Fetch up-to-date library documentation, API references, and code examples through the Context7 MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Fetch current library docs and code examples with Context7.
interface.longDescription: Context7 connects agents to current library and framework documentation through the Context7 MCP server, reducing stale API answers by resolving library IDs and fetching relevant docs on demand.
defaultPrompt: Look up the current API reference for Next.js App Router route handlers, including the supported HTTP methods, caching behavior, and request/response types in the latest stable version.
Fetch Prisma documentation for one-to-many and many-to-many relation queries, including nested writes, connect/disconnect patterns, and the latest include and select API.
Find the Supabase Auth documentation for passwordless email sign-in with PKCE flow, including the client-side setup, server-side verification, and Row Level Security policies.
